Headline: #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland Temporary Northbound Reroute near Nagle/Bryn Mawr
ShortDescription: Northbound 86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temp. rerouted via Nagle, Bryn Mawr, Northwest Highway and Nagle: due to, street blockage near Nagle/Bryn Mawr.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #86 Narragansett/Ridgeland buses are temporarily rerouted via Nagle, Bryn Mawr, Northwest Highway and Nagle: due to, street blockage near Nagle/Bryn Mawr.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #1 Indiana/Hyde Park, #4 Cottage Grove and # X4 Cottage Grove Express Temporary Southbound Reroute near Michigan/25th
ShortDescription: Southbound 1 Indiana/Hyde Park, 4 Cottage Grove and #X4 Cottage Grove Express buses are temporarily rerouted near Michigan/25th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #1 Indiana/Hyde Park, #4 Cottage Grove and # X4 Cottage Grove Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Michigan, 25th, King Drive, 26th, Michigan and over regular route due to a street blockage near Michigan/25th.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #70 Division Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Division/Lamon
ShortDescription: Eastbound 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Division/Lamon.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted via Division, Laramie, Augusta, Cicero and Division, over normal route: due to street blockage near Division/Lamon.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #57 Laramie Temporary Reroute at Laramie/Ohio
ShortDescription: 57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Laramie/Ohio.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#57 Laramie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Laramie, Chicago, Cicero, Fulton, Laramie and over regular route, due to street blockage near Laramie/Ohio.

Allow extra travel time.
